projectDescription: A Vue 3 multi-vendor e-commerce management dashboard that integrates Shopify, Bsale POS, MercadoPago payments, and Uber Direct delivery into a unified platform for vendors and administrators.
keyFeatures: Multi-vendor dashboard with role-based access control (vendor and admin roles)
Real-time order management with status filtering and order details modal
Product catalog management with Bsale and Shopify synchronization
Bsale POS integration via OAuth for connecting point-of-sale systems
Shopify store integration for product and inventory management
MercadoPago payment processing with webhook support
Uber Direct delivery quoting and shipment tracking
Firebase Authentication with email/password login, registration, and password reset
Firestore database for real-time data persistence
Firebase Cloud Functions backend for all API operations
publicApiSurface: GET /bsale-callback — Handle Bsale OAuth callback and token storage
GET /shopify-products — Fetch products from Shopify store
POST /sync-products — Sync selected products from Bsale to Shopify
POST /desync-products — Remove product sync between Bsale and Shopify
POST /mercadopago-createpay — Create a MercadoPago payment preference
POST /mercadopago-webhook — Validate and process MercadoPago payment notifications
POST /uber-quote — Get delivery quote from Uber Direct
GET /orders — Retrieve orders for the authenticated vendor
